case_title: STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP VS. THOMAS BROCK et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 GEARY STREET, #607, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP SERVED MAY-11-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP SERVED MAY-11-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $44.69 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS SENT TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS RETURNED--UNCLAIMED; UNABLE TO FORWARD

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD APARTMENTS, LP AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS SENT TO THOMAS BROCK RETURNED--UNCLAIMED; UNABLE TO FORWARD
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS
